testcase.name: Saucedemo Products Tests › Product Display Verification › should display all products
Saucedemo Products Tests › Product Display Verification › should have correct product count
Saucedemo Products Tests › Product Display Verification › should display page title
Saucedemo Products Tests › Product Display Verification › should have visible product container
Saucedemo Products Tests › Product Display Verification › should display all product names
Saucedemo Products Tests › Product Display Verification › should display all product prices
Saucedemo Products Tests › Sorting Functionality › should have default sort as A to Z
Saucedemo Products Tests › Sorting Functionality › should sort products from A to Z
Saucedemo Products Tests › Sorting Functionality › should sort products from Z to A
Saucedemo Products Tests › Sorting Functionality › should sort price from low to high
Saucedemo Products Tests › Sorting Functionality › should sort price from high to low
Saucedemo Products Tests › Add to Cart Operations › should add single item to cart
Saucedemo Products Tests › Add to Cart Operations › should add multiple items to cart
Saucedemo Products Tests › Add to Cart Operations › should add item to cart by index
Saucedemo Products Tests › Add to Cart Operations › should change button to Remove after adding item
Saucedemo Products Tests › Add to Cart Operations › should update cart badge when item is added to cart
Saucedemo Products Tests › Remove from Cart operations › should remove single product from cart
Saucedemo Products Tests › Remove from Cart operations › should decrement cart badge when removing
Saucedemo Products Tests › Product Navigation › should navigate to product detail
Saucedemo Products Tests › Product Navigation › should navigate to cart
Saucedemo Products Tests › Get Product Information › should display product names correctly
Saucedemo Products Tests › Get Product Information › should display product prices correctly
Saucedemo Products Tests › Get Product Information › should have correct product details
Saucedemo Products Tests › User Menu › should logout successsfully
